---
title: "Webpage_CompBio"
---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

[homework 1](homework1.html)

[lab 3](lab_3.html)

[lab 4](lab_4.html)

[homework 5](hw_5.html)

[homework 6](hw_6.html)

[homework 7](hm_7.html)

[homework 8](hm_8.html)
